title: coryphantha neovivipara var. aggregata
intro: Coryphantha neovivipara var. aggregata, also known as a type of cactus, is a rare and endemic species found in Mexico. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Coryphantha neovivipara var. aggregata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and ground into a powder, which can be used to make teas, capsules, or topical creams for its medicinal properties.
